name: meta-architect-local
description: Local directory marketplace for Story Forge's vendored copy of the meta-architect plugin. The plugin has graduated to https://github.com/yaaisiu/claude-dev-tooling; SF consumes this copy in-place and re-syncs deliberately (see ../UPSTREAM.md).

plugins.name: meta-architect
plugins.description: Domain-agnostic product architect: writes Markdown design artefacts into an Obsidian-compatible vault and teaches architecture vocabulary as it works. Never writes production code.
